How it works

Set up your Agent in minutes
without a PhD degree

Set up your Agent in minutes
without a PhD degree

Get ai-powered phone calls triggered by your existing automations - no emails, no back-and-forth, no manual work!

Get ai-powered phone calls triggered by your existing automations - no emails, no back-and-forth, no manual work!

Try AI scheduling

1

Set your trigger

Choose when the AI agent should call. Whether it's on form submission, after no-shows, or before a meeting - fully integrated with Workflows.

2

Add a phone number

Assign a dedicated phone number your AI agent will call from. You can even import an existing phone number.

3

Set up your AI agent

Write custom prompts for reminders, confirmations, or follow-ups. The AI handles the rest, in your voice and tone.

Why Cal.ai?

Why Cal.ai's AI phone calls transform your scheduling

Why Cal.ai's AI phone calls transform your scheduling

Cal.ai powers automated, human-like phone calls with customizable conversations and seamless workflow integration, it reduces no-shows, boosts conversions, and saves time.

Cal.ai powers automated, human-like phone calls with customizable conversations and seamless workflow integration, it reduces no-shows, boosts conversions, and saves time.

Try AI scheduling

Personality

You are confident without being pushy. Respectful and with patience.

Prompt style

You are helping potential leads set up calls with our sales team.

Tone

You are a professional, pleasant and friendly. You are understanding.

Fully customizable AI scheduling conversations

Craft every call to match your business needs, whether it’s confirming a booking, reminding a lead, or rescheduling a no-show. With Cal.ai, you can write your own script prompts, set the tone and personality of the agent, and define clear goals for each call, giving you full control over the conversation.

Human-like AI scheduling calls that feel real

Cal.ai delivers natural, human-like phone calls that adapt to the flow of conversation. Unlike rigid AI scripts, you can fully customize the tone, style, and intent of each call to match your brand voice, whether friendly, professional, or anything in between.

Cal.ai Agent

Hi, Alex. This is Sally from Deel. How are you doing today?

I’m doing great Sally, thanks for asking. How are you?

Cal.ai Agent

I’m great! I’m just calling to see if you can still make the call tomorrow?

Trigger

24 hours before

Action

Call attendee w/ Cal.ai Voice Agent

Cal.ai is seamlessly integrated with Cal.com workflows

Cal.ai is built natively into Cal.com Workflows, so you can automate AI-powered scheduling calls without relying on third-party tools or complex setups. It works directly within your existing booking flows to streamline scheduling from end to end.

  • Trigger AI phone calls based on events like bookings, no-shows, or cancellations

  • Combine with email, SMS, and other Cal.com automations

AI call analytics, transcripts, and performance insights

Cal.ai gives you full visibility into every AI-powered scheduling call so you can monitor, measure, and optimize performance across your workflows. Access detailed call transcripts directly in your Cal.com dashboard

  • Track key performance metrics like call completion and booking rates

  • Analyze customer sentiment to understand tone, intent, and engagement

  • Use real-time data to improve scripts and increase conversion rates

$0.29/minute

Save time at just $0.29 per minute

With Cal.ai, every AI-powered phone call costs only $0.29 per minute (29 credits per minute). Automate reminders, confirmations, and bookings, freeing your team from repetitive calls. The result is massive time savings at an extremely low cost, making Cal.ai a powerful and affordable way to streamline scheduling.

Automated AI calls that fill calendars and reduce no-shows

Increase bookings with proactive AI calls

Follow up with leads who haven’t scheduled yet. Cal.ai can automatically call and guide them toward booking a time on your calendar, helping you close more opportunities.

Reduce no-shows with personalized reminders

AI phone reminders feel more personal than emails or texts, and they’re proven to boost meeting attendance. Set up reminder calls before key meetings or appointments

Save hours every week through automation

Your team no longer needs to make repetitive scheduling or reminder calls. Cal.ai handles it all 24/7 with consistent, human-like delivery.

Deliver a better customer experience at scale

Every call sounds natural, friendly, and on-brand. Whether you're in healthcare, sales, or services, Cal.ai gives every customer the personal attention they expect without manual effort.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about Cal.ai

Frequently asked questions about Cal.ai

Have questions about Cal.ai, AI-powered scheduling calls? Our FAQs cover everything you need to know to get started and make the most of your Cal.ai experience.

Have questions about Cal.ai, AI-powered scheduling calls? Our FAQs cover everything you need to know to get started and make the most of your Cal.ai experience.

Try AI scheduling

What is Cal.ai and how does it improve scheduling?

Cal.ai integrates with Cal.com to automate phone calls for scheduling. These AI-powered calls handle reminders, confirmations, and follow-ups, improving efficiency and reducing no-shows.

How does Cal.ai’s AI voice sound?

Cal.ai’s AI-powered voice is highly natural and lifelike, designed to replicate human conversations. Most people won’t notice it’s an AI unless they’re told.

Can I customize the AI phone calls?

Yes, you can fully customize the language, tone, and prompts of the AI phone calls to align with your brand and scheduling needs.

Does Cal.ai work with my existing calendar?

Yes, Cal.ai seamlessly integrates with your existing calendar and scheduling workflows on Cal.com, ensuring smooth automation of your booking process.

What happens if someone doesn’t answer the AI call?

If a call is missed, Cal.ai can leave a voicemail, send a follow-up message, or retry the call, based on your predefined workflow settings.

Is Cal.ai available for all Cal.com plans?

Yes, Cal.ai is available for all plans!

How does pricing work for Cal.ai? What is the cost per minute?

Cal.ai pricing is based on credits, with each call consuming a set number of credits based on its length. The cost is 29 credits per minute, which equals $0.29 per minute.

How many credits are included in my current plan?

Individuals don't get any credits included. Individuals have to purchase credits separately. Teams receive 750 credits per member per month. Organizations receive 1000 credits per member per month. Credits get renewed monthly. Usage updates in real time, and additional credits can be purchased anytime in your team settings. You can see your remaining Cal.ai credits in your Cal.com dashboard. Learn more here.

How can I buy more credits for Cal.ai?

If you need additional Cal.ai credits, you can purchase them anytime through your Cal.com dashboard. Learn more here.
